description: You are a Sales Manager who needs to streamline the Leads module layout to improve data entry efficiency. In the Leads module layout, create a new custom block named 'Qualification Metrics' positioned below the 'Lead Details' block. Relocate the 'Industry', 'Annual Revenue', and 'No Of Employees' fields into the 'Qualification Metrics' block. Additionally, set the 'Fax' field to hidden and save the updated layout.
